macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: New York Stock Market Rises Reflecting Negotiation Expectations
items.summary: Major U.S. indices showed positive movement on March 25, 2026, with the market rising amid negotiation expectations. The S&P 500 gained 35.53 points (0.54%), Nasdaq Composite rose 167.93 points (0.77%), and the Dow Jones increased 305.43 points (0.66%).

items.title: Nasdaq Lists Ten New Vanguard Target Maturity Corporate Bond ETFs
items.summary: Nasdaq began listing ten Vanguard Target Maturity Corporate Bond ETFs on March 26, 2026, with maturities ranging from 2027 to 2036. The new ETFs include tickers VBCA through VBCJ.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Holds $71K Support Amid Market Consolidation
items.summary: Bitcoin is trading at $71,240, up 0.36% in the past 24 hours, consolidating at critical support levels between $70,450-$71,890. Market sentiment remains fearful as BTC holds the $70,500-$71,000 support zone.

items.title: Bitcoin Gains $256 as Price Recovers Slightly
items.summary: Bitcoin rose $256.54 to $71,299.68 on March 25, though it remains approximately $16,100 below its price from one year ago. Bitcoin's market cap stands at $1.33 trillion.

items.title: CACrypto Launches XRP-Powered Green Mobility Challenge
items.summary: CACrypto announced the launch of a blockchain-based Green Mobility Challenge utilizing XRP technology as part of its Web3-driven initiative.

items.title: THORChain to Hold Protocol Update AMA on March 26
items.summary: THORChain will host its THORSday livestream on March 26 at 18:00 UTC, featuring protocol updates and community Q&A sessions.

items.title: AI-Linked Tokens and Layer-1 Projects Gain Traction
items.summary: Bittensor (TAO) continues trending with the AI-blockchain narrative, while Monad (MON) sees increased testnet participation ahead of its expected Q2 2026 mainnet launch, with speculative positioning driven by airdrop expectations.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Los Alamos National Lab Trains AI Model for Electroplating Optimization
items.summary: Researchers at Los Alamos National Laboratory successfully trained a generative diffusion-based AI model on rhenium electroplating data, enabling accurate prediction of surface roughness and crack formation from processing parameters. The model reduces the need for extensive physical experiments and shows potential for materials discovery and real-time experiment guidance.

items.title: ITU Announces AI for Good Global Summit in Geneva for July 2026
items.summary: The International Telecommunication Union will host the seventh AI for Good Global Summit from July 7-10, 2026, in Geneva, featuring live demos of agentic AI, edge AI, brain-computer interfaces, and discussions on AI governance, standards, and national strategies.

items.title: University of Florida Hosts AI Literacy Conference with SharkAI Project
items.summary: UF is hosting a two-day conference on March 26-27 for National AI Literacy Day, showcasing the SharkAI project that uses shark teeth fossils and 3D prints to teach middle school students machine learning, data collection, and ethical AI practices.

items.title: Anthropic Warns of Risks from Disobedient Agentic AI in Telecom
items.summary: Anthropic's warnings about rogue robots and disobedient technology highlight growing risks for telecom companies rapidly adopting agentic AI, potentially leading to a major industry upset.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Expanse: Osiris Reborn Reveal Expected at Xbox Preview Show
items.summary: A major reveal for the space opera action RPG Expanse: Osiris Reborn is anticipated tomorrow at the Xbox preview show, potentially including an extended trailer, gameplay, or beta announcement.

items.title: Multiple Game Releases on March 26 Including Screamer, Ever Siege, and Otoshi Fighting for Love
items.summary: Games launching March 26 across platforms include Screamer (PS5, Steam, Xbox), Ever Siege: Untold Ages (PC), Otoshi Fighting for Love (Switch), Dracamar, Neopets Mega Mini Games Collection, and Cookie Run OvenSmash.

items.title: ByteDance Sells Moonton to Savvy Games Group Amid AI Shift
items.summary: ByteDance has sold Moonton to Savvy Games Group while retaining studio leadership, redirecting focus to generative AI; Epic Games cuts over 1,000 jobs as Fortnite returns to Android.

items.title: Bandai Namco Announces Digimon Up Mobile RPG for 2026 and Story Time Stranger Expansion
items.summary: Bandai Namco revealed 2026 mobile RPG Digimon Up, a 2027 expansion for Digimon Story Time Stranger, and updates for Digimon Alysion; Square Enix launched DISSIDIA DUELLUM FINAL FANTASY on mobile.

items.title: PS Plus Essential Game Leaked for April 2026
items.summary: A major PlayStation Plus Essential title for April 2026 has leaked, with official reveal expected soon; Lords of the Fallen receives ongoing major updates.

items.title: eFootball 2026 Thursday Update Brings 'Return of the Kings' and Thierry Henry Rumors
items.summary: The March 26 eFootball 2026 update introduces 'Return of the Kings,' free points, a new POTW Worldwide pack, and rumors of Thierry Henry as a Legend Epic card.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Trump Forms Big Tech Advisory Panel for Science and Technology
items.summary: President Trump announced a 13-member President's Council of Advisors on Science and Technology (PCAST), co-chaired by David Sacks and Michael Kratsios, including leaders like Sergey Brin, Mark Zuckerberg, Larry Ellison, Jensen Huang, Michael Dell, and Safra Catz to guide tech policy.

items.title: Dell Launches New Sleek Commercial PCs and Workstations
items.summary: Dell Technologies unveiled its thinnest and lightest Dell Pro notebooks yet, along with Pro Precision workstations, conferencing monitors, keyboards, and mice, emphasizing performance for productivity and on-device workloads with global availability starting now.

items.title: Deep-Sea Mining Gains Momentum Under Trump Administration
items.summary: Deep-sea mining technology for rare-earth metals is advancing toward commercialization, with The Metals Company reporting successful 2022 tests and CEO Gerard Barron set to testify, aiming to reduce U.S. reliance on China for critical minerals used in tech hardware.

items.title: Meta Hit with $375M Penalty in New Mexico Youth Safety Case
items.summary: A New Mexico jury imposed a $375 million civil penalty on Meta for endangering young users and misleading the public about platform safety, marking the first successful state lawsuit against a major tech company for harming youth online.
